title.zh: 混合动力域控制策略研究（电机控制策略）

summary.zh: 面向行星排混合动力非道路车辆的动力域控制器策略设计，基于 MBD + AUTOSAR 实现双电机精确转矩控制与 LADRC 抗扰转速跟踪。
summary.en: Powertrain domain-controller strategy for planetary-gear hybrid off-road vehicles — dual-motor precise torque control and LADRC disturbance-rejection speed tracking, built with MBD + AUTOSAR.

subtitle.zh: 面向行星排混合动力非道路车辆的动力域控制器策略设计，以英飞凌 AURIX TC387 为硬件平台，采用基于模型设计（MBD）与 AUTOSAR 架构，研究双电机精确转矩控制与 ISG 电机抗扰转速跟踪。
subtitle.en: Powertrain domain-controller strategy for planetary-gear hybrid off-road vehicles — built on the Infineon AURIX TC387 with Model-Based Design (MBD) and AUTOSAR, researching dual-motor precise torque control and disturbance-rejection speed tracking for the ISG motor.

content.zh: 本课题为硕士毕业设计研究方向，面向行星排混合动力非道路车辆的动力域控制器策略设计，旨在提升整机燃油经济性与复杂路况下的速度稳定性。非道路车辆负载多变、工况复杂，对动力域控制器的转矩分配与抗扰能力提出了更高要求。
content.en: This is my master's thesis direction: designing the powertrain domain-controller strategy for planetary-gear hybrid off-road vehicles, aiming to improve overall fuel economy and speed stability under complex road conditions. Off-road vehicles face highly variable loads and demanding duty cycles, raising the bar for the controller's torque allocation and disturbance rejection.

items.zh: 以英飞凌 AURIX TC387 四核处理器为硬件平台，采用基于模型设计（MBD）方法，在 Simulink 中完成系统建模与控制算法开发。
items.en: Used the Infineon AURIX TC387 quad-core processor as the hardware platform; applied Model-Based Design (MBD) to build the system model and control algorithms in Simulink.

items.zh: 自动生成代码，采用 AUTOSAR 架构开发并部署至控制器。
items.en: Auto-generated code and deployed it to the controller under an AUTOSAR architecture.

items.zh: 研究基于矢量控制（FOC）的双电机精确转矩控制算法。
items.en: Researched a Field-Oriented Control (FOC) based dual-motor precise torque-control algorithm.

items.zh: 引入线性自抗扰控制（LADRC），提升 ISG 电机在变负载工况下的抗扰转速跟踪性能。
items.en: Introduced Linear Active Disturbance Rejection Control (LADRC) to improve the ISG motor's disturbance-rejection speed tracking under varying loads.

items.zh: 独立开发基于 CAN 通讯的双电机控制上位机，实现场景测试、实时状态展示与控制器核心参数标定。
items.en: Independently built a CAN-based dual-motor host application for scenario testing, real-time status display, and calibration of core controller parameters.

content.zh: 构建了从 Simulink 建模、自动代码生成到 AUTOSAR 部署的完整开发链路，实现双电机精确转矩控制；LADRC 显著提升了 ISG 电机在变负载下的转速跟踪抗扰能力，配合自研上位机完成场景测试与参数标定。
content.en: Established a complete pipeline from Simulink modeling and auto-code generation to AUTOSAR deployment, achieving precise dual-motor torque control; LADRC markedly improved the ISG motor's disturbance-rejection speed tracking under varying loads, with the in-house host tool enabling scenario testing and calibration.

content.zh: 独立完成控制算法的 Simulink 建模、FOC / LADRC 算法设计与整定、AUTOSAR 代码生成与控制器部署，并自主开发基于 CAN 的双电机控制上位机。
content.en: Independently handled the Simulink modeling, FOC / LADRC design and tuning, AUTOSAR code generation and controller deployment, and built the CAN-based dual-motor host application from scratch.

caption.zh: 图：控制策略架构 / Simulink 模型

results.zh: 硕士毕业设计 · 在研

title.zh: 智能网联汽车网络安全防护

summary.zh: 国家重点研发项目：基于 LSTM 的车载以太网入侵检测系统，并搭建上位机→树莓派→4G→云端的车云交互演示平台。
summary.en: National key R&D project: an LSTM-based automotive-Ethernet intrusion detection system, plus a vehicle-to-cloud demo platform (host → Raspberry Pi → 4G → cloud).

subtitle.zh: 参与国家重点研发项目，开发基于 LSTM 神经网络的车载以太网入侵检测系统，并设计车—云交互演示平台，打通上位机→树莓派 CAN 报文→4G 网络→云端的完整链路。
subtitle.en: Part of a national key R&D project — developed an LSTM-based intrusion detection system for automotive Ethernet and designed a vehicle-to-cloud demo platform spanning host → Raspberry Pi CAN frames → 4G → cloud.

content.zh: 随着智能网联汽车通信链路的开放，车载网络面临日益严峻的入侵与攻击风险。本项目作为国家重点研发项目的一部分，针对车载以太网的异常流量检测与车云协同防护展开研究。
content.en: As connected-vehicle communication links open up, in-vehicle networks face increasingly serious intrusion risks. As part of a national key R&D project, this work studied anomaly detection on automotive Ethernet and vehicle-cloud collaborative protection.

items.zh: 开发基于 LSTM 神经网络的车载以太网入侵检测系统，实现异常数据的实时监测与预警。
items.en: Developed an LSTM-based intrusion detection system for automotive Ethernet, enabling real-time anomaly monitoring and alerting.

items.zh: 负责云交互演示平台的界面设计。
items.en: Responsible for the UI design of the cloud-interaction demo platform.

items.zh: 打通上位机 → 树莓派 CAN 报文 → 4G 网络 → 云端的完整数据链路。
items.en: Built the full data link: host → Raspberry Pi CAN frames → 4G network → cloud.

items.zh: 结合内网穿透技术完成车云交互软件的联调与验证。
items.en: Used intranet-penetration techniques to integrate and validate the vehicle-cloud interaction software.

content.zh: 作为项目组成员，参与 LSTM 入侵检测模型的开发，并独立负责云交互演示平台的界面设计与车—云链路搭建。
content.en: As a project team member, I contributed to the LSTM intrusion-detection model and independently owned the demo-platform UI and the vehicle-to-cloud data link.

results.zh:
国家重点研发项目
实时入侵检测与车云联调
results.en:
National key R&D project
Real-time IDS + vehicle-cloud integration

title.zh: 汽车漏洞挖掘比赛 · 车载 GPS 欺骗干扰

summary.zh: 中汽中心汽车漏洞挖掘比赛，主攻车载 GPS 欺骗干扰方向，利用 HackRF 对实车发起攻击。
summary.en: CATARC automotive vulnerability-mining competition — focused on in-vehicle GPS spoofing/jamming, attacking real vehicles with HackRF.

subtitle.zh: 参与中汽中心汽车漏洞挖掘比赛，主攻车载 GPS 欺骗干扰方向，利用 HackRF 无线电设备对实车发起攻击，成功使多款目标车型 GPS 系统瘫痪。
subtitle.en: Competed in the CATARC automotive vulnerability-mining contest, focusing on in-vehicle GPS spoofing/jamming — using the HackRF SDR to attack real vehicles and successfully disabling the GPS of several target models.

content.zh: 车载导航与众多智能驾驶功能依赖 GPS 定位，其无线信号易受欺骗与干扰攻击。在中汽中心组织的汽车漏洞挖掘比赛中，本团队主攻车载 GPS 安全方向，开展授权范围内的攻防测试。
content.en: In-vehicle navigation and many ADAS functions rely on GPS, whose wireless signals are vulnerable to spoofing and jamming. In the CATARC-organized vulnerability-mining competition, our team focused on in-vehicle GPS security, performing authorized red-team testing.

items.zh: 利用 HackRF 软件无线电设备，对车载 GPS 信号实施欺骗与干扰。
items.en: Used the HackRF software-defined radio to spoof and jam in-vehicle GPS signals.

items.zh: 在授权测试环境下对实车发起攻击，验证多款目标车型的定位脆弱性。
items.en: Launched authorized attacks on real vehicles, verifying positioning vulnerabilities across several target models.

items.zh: 成功使目标多款车型的 GPS 系统瘫痪，输出漏洞验证结论。
items.en: Successfully disabled the GPS of multiple target models and delivered vulnerability findings.

results.zh:
授权攻防测试
多款车型 GPS 瘫痪验证
results.en:
Authorized red-team test
GPS disabled on multiple models

title.zh: 中国汽车工程学会巴哈大赛 · 悬架设计

summary.zh: 负责赛车悬架结构设计与加工，使用 CATIA / ANSYS 建模与强度分析，并用 DMU 模块完成运动校核。
summary.en: Designed and fabricated the race-car suspension; modeled and ran strength analysis in CATIA / ANSYS and validated motion with the DMU module.

subtitle.zh: 作为悬架组成员参与中国汽车工程学会巴哈大赛，负责赛车悬架结构设计与加工，使用 CATIA / ANSYS 进行建模与强度分析，并利用 CATIA DMU 模块完成运动与装配校核。
subtitle.en: As a suspension-team member in Baja SAE China, I designed and fabricated the race-car suspension, modeled and analyzed strength in CATIA / ANSYS, and validated motion and assembly with the CATIA DMU module.

content.zh: 中国汽车工程学会巴哈大赛要求参赛队伍自主设计、制造一辆越野赛车。悬架系统直接决定赛车在复杂越野路况下的通过性、操控性与可靠性。
content.en: Baja SAE China challenges teams to design and build an off-road race car from scratch. The suspension directly governs the car's mobility, handling, and reliability on rough off-road terrain.

items.zh: 负责赛车悬架结构的方案设计与零部件加工。
items.en: Owned the structural design of the suspension and fabrication of its parts.

items.zh: 使用 CATIA 建立悬架三维模型，ANSYS 进行强度与刚度分析。
items.en: Built 3D suspension models in CATIA and ran strength/stiffness analysis in ANSYS.

items.zh: 利用 CATIA 的 DMU 模块完成运动干涉检查与装配校核。
items.en: Used the CATIA DMU module for motion/interference checks and assembly validation.

content.zh: 作为悬架组成员，承担悬架结构设计、有限元强度校核与运动学校核工作，并参与实车加工装配。
content.en: As a suspension-team member, I handled structural design, FEA strength checks, and kinematic validation, and took part in fabrication and assembly.

results.zh:
悬架结构设计 / 加工
强度与运动校核
